allow: Bash(node -e "const d=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\)\); const keys=Object.keys\(d\); console.log\('keys:', keys\); if\(d.Note\) console.log\('Note:', d.Note\); if\(d.Information\) console.log\('Info:', d.Information\); const ts=d['Time Series \(Daily\)']; if\(ts\){ const dates=Object.keys\(ts\).sort\(\).slice\(-3\); dates.forEach\(k=>console.log\(k, ts[k]['4. close']\)\); } ")

Bash(node -e "const d=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('C:/tmp/av_test.json','utf8'\)\); const keys=Object.keys\(d\); console.log\('top-level keys:', keys\); if\(d.Note\) console.log\('Note:', d.Note\); if\(d.Information\) console.log\('Info:', d.Information\); const ts=d['Time Series \(Daily\)']; if\(ts\){ const dates=Object.keys\(ts\).sort\(\).slice\(-3\); console.log\('last 3 dates:'\); dates.forEach\(k=>console.log\(k, ts[k]['4. close']\)\); } else console.log\('No Time Series data'\);")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys; data = sys.stdin.buffer.read\(\); print\(data.decode\('utf-8', errors='replace'\)[:500]\)")
